GPIO

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x51600000
Size:
0x2d8
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

General Purpose I/O controller. APB slave with 4 ports (A/B/C/D) mapping to 112 independently configurable GPIO signals. Port A supports configurable interrupt generation with optional debounce.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x000 swporta_dr Port A Data
0x004 swporta_ddr Port A Data Direction
0x008 - -
0x00C swportb_dr Port B Data
0x010 swportb_ddr Port B Data Direction
0x014 - -
0x018 swportc_dr Port C Data
0x01C swportc_ddr Port C Data Direction
0x020 - -
0x024 swportd_dr Port D Data
0x028 swportd_ddr Port D Data Direction
0x02C - -
0x030 inten Interrupt Enable
0x034 intmask Interrupt Mask
0x038 inttype_level Interrupt Type
0x03C int_polarity Interrupt Polarity
0x040 intstatus Interrupt Status
0x044 raw_intstatus Raw Interrupt Status
0x048 debounce Debounce Enable
0x04C porta_eoi Port A End of Interrupt
0x050 ext_porta External Port A
0x054 ext_portb External Port B
0x058 ext_portc External Port C
0x05C ext_portd External Port D
0x060 ls_sync Level-Sensitive Synchronization
0x064 id_code GPIO ID Code
0x068 - -
0x06C ver_id_code GPIO Component Version
0x070 config_reg2 GPIO Configuration Register 2
0x074 config_reg1 GPIO Configuration Register 1
0x078 - -
0x0D8 modsel_a[128] Mode Select / Routing?
